reviews.review_description:
The game seemed very fun and fair/ just challenging enough, making me really consider buying the full game. But... I can't even get through the demo!
By Japan Lv. 8, it became slightly annoying. By Lv. 9, literally impossible even after 20 attempts! Which is ridiculous if the full game has 100+ levels total! Meaning it will do nothing but become 100x even MORE impossible going forward somehow if I SOMEHOW got very lucky and completed Lv. 9 and 10...
This game was built more with the idea of co-op I'd assume, because there are no difficulty settings to choose from and they thought this level of basically impossible/ utterly frustrating difficulty was actually fine to use as the one & only default difficulty for everyone...

So 1-Star for what's otherwise a well made and fun game/ demo, but thanks to the absurd difficulty spikes AS SOON AS LV. 8-9 (not even the  demo's ful worth of 10 levels), I can't say I'm going to put money down for the full game like I was before...

Honestly, I think this game is really trash because sometimes it gets confusing but it’s a little just too boring like for real for real no one that I not realize again it all I said is that the game is so trash, but they will never play ever again in life
It is great for a demo, 10 levels it is fine. But i.m not sure if would play for hours.

reviews.review_title: Classic retro game reimagined for vr
reviews.review_description: I’m not sure if I would play the whole thing trough in the full version but it’s fun and easy to pickup. This is basically the game pang from the arcade days in vr with added elements. For example, there are guns on the walls you have to dodge and you also get matrix like bullet time. Other than that, I didn’t notice more differences.
